They say that when a phoenix hatchling decides to lodge itself in your head, it's a sign that you'll always come back from the dead. This is the case, for example, with the famous phoenix rider Irk, famous for always reappearing at the point of return. It is said that when his younger brother, Chun of Andromeda, was chosen to be trained by Hela, the Queen of Death, in Niflheim, Irk ended up going in his place. There, he fell in love with the young Chuna of Emerald, who strangely looked a lot like his brother. No details are known, but on his return from training, Irk had turned into a cold and heartless knight, except when he ran to save his brother or to take care of the phoenix cub on his head.
